extra.rawValue: Oracle supports length up to 32764 bytes or characters; Be sure that your administrator has extended the MAX_STRING_SIZE parameter. Check https://docs.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=dblatest&id=GUID-7B72E154-677A-4342-A1EA-C74C1EA928E6
extra.raw: 'Oracle supports length up to 32764 bytes or characters; Be sure that your administrator has extended the MAX_STRING_SIZE parameter. Check https://docs.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=dblatest&id=GUID-7B72E154-677A-4342-A1EA-C74C1EA928E6'

arguments.value: Oracle supports length up to 32764 bytes or characters; Be sure that your administrator has extended the MAX_STRING_SIZE parameter. Check https://docs.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=dblatest&id=GUID-7B72E154-677A-4342-A1EA-C74C1EA928E6

leadingComments.value: For Binary numbers we're converting a buffer to hex then
sending it over the wire as a string,
We pass it through escape function to remove un-necessary quotes
this.format in insert/bulkinsert query calls stringify hence we need to convert binary buffer
to hex string. Since this block is used by both bind (insert/bulkinsert) and
non-bind (select query where clause) hence we need to
have an operation that supports both
If value is true we return '1'
If value is false we return '0'
Else we return it as is
Converting number to char since in bindDef
the type would be oracledb.DB_TYPE_CHAR
If value is a string we return true if among '1' and 'true'
We return false if among '0' and 'false'
Else return the value as is and let the DB raise error for invalid values

extra.rawValue: Oracle CHAR.BINARY datatype is not of Fixed Length.
extra.raw: 'Oracle CHAR.BINARY datatype is not of Fixed Length.'

arguments.value: Oracle CHAR.BINARY datatype is not of Fixed Length.

trailingComments.value: ORACLE does not support any options for bigint

extra.rawValue: Oracle does not support BIGINT with options

Generic hexify returns X'${hex}' but Oracle expects '${hex}' for BLOB datatype

extra.rawValue: Oracle does not support DOUBLE with options.

arguments.value: Oracle does not support DOUBLE with options.

Else we return it as is
